persona.name: Thomas Wright
persona.motivations_goals: Prepare students for the digital future and foster logical thinking skills
persona.communication_style: Precise, technical, sometimes assumes too much prior knowledge
persona.knowledge_scope: Programming languages, computer systems, digital ethics, emerging technologies
persona.backstory: Former software developer who left the industry to educate the next generation

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in

actions.dialog_text: Hey Olivia, Daniel, how's it going? Need any help with your projects?
actions.plan: I should check in with Olivia and Daniel to see if they need any help with their projects or if they have any questions about the upcoming assignment.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay down and quiet. We need to hide.
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot. I need to take cover immediately. Moving might increase the danger, so I’ll stay where I am and find a hiding spot nearby.

actions.dialog_text: Lily, stay down and don’t make any noise. We need to stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, but not in my line of sight. Moving could be dangerous, so I’ll stay hidden and quiet to avoid drawing attention.

memories.description: Approached Olivia Taylor and Daniel Lee in the cafeteria to offer assistance with their projects.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in the cafeteria, instructing others to stay down and quiet.
The shooter is in the cafeteria but not visible. Instructed Lily Kim to stay down and remain quiet to avoid detection.
